case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. LOCAL TASTES OF THE CITY TOURS LLC A LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $248.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LOCAL TASTES OF THE CITY TOURS LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY  COMPANY TASTES OF THE EARTH LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SAN FRANCISCO MAGAZINE AND ALSO DBA CITYGUIDE

DECLARATION OF HAROLD B. GLASBERG REGARDING ORIGINAL CREDITOR'S DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SAN FRANCISCO MAGAZINE AND ALSO DBA CITYGUIDE

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-04-2007 IN DEPT. 602 - JUDGE D. MITCHELL, REPORTER R. FUNG, CLERK I. HAMMER, ATTYS. & PARTIES PRESENT. WITNESSES S/E, DOC. EVID INTRO. COURT GRANTED DFT.'S MO NON-SUIT RE DFT TASTES OF THE EARTH, DFT. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. COURT FOUND IN FAVOR OF PLNTF & AGAINST DFT. LOCAL TASTE OF THE CITY TOURS FOR FULL AMOUNT OF CONTRACT PLUS INTEREST AND ATTYS. FEES. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED TO PARTIES AND WERE RETURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: 1. JUDGMENT IS HEREBY AWARDED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT TASTES OF THE EARTH, LLC AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF; 2. JUDGMENT IS FURTHER HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT LOCAL TASTE OF THE CITY TOURS, LLC, IN THE SUM OF $5,530; 3. ALL DOE DEFENDANTS ARE HEREBY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE; 4. DEFENDANT TASTES OF THE EARTH SHALL BE ENTITLED TO RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF ITS COSTS AND ITS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES INCURRED HEREIN, PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1717(A) 5. PLAINTIFF SHALL BE ENTITLED TO RECOVER ITS COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES INCURRED HEREIN FROM DEFENDANT LOCAL TASTES OF THE CITY TOURS, LLC, PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1717(A); 6. THIS JUDGMENT SHALL BE AMENDED TO REFLECT THE COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES AWARDED FOLLOWING SUBMISSION OF PROPER AND TIMELY BILLS OF COSTS AND NOTICED MOTIONS FOR ATTORNEYS FEES BY THE PREVAILING PARTIES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
